description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cafe racer design with a sleek, elongated fuel tank finished in a deep, glossy maroon color. The seat is a flat, brown leather bench style, suitable for one or two riders, and is supported by dual rear shock absorbers. The frame and wheel rims are predominantly black, with striking orange accents on the wheels and whitewall tires, giving it a retro yet sporty appearance. The engine is exposed and rendered in metallic silver, with visible exhaust pipes running along the side. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a round headlamp, flanked by two rearview mirrors and orange turn signals. The overall build is compact and streamlined, ideal for urban commuting and stylish city rides.
description: A classic cafe racer-style motorcycle with a maroon fuel tank, brown leather seat, black frame, and orange-accented wheels. It features a round headlamp, exposed silver engine, and retro design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon fuel tank, brown seat, silver engine, and orange-accented wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown seat, rear fender, taillight, and symmetrical handlebars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same maroon tank, brown seat, and engine details, with visible exhaust pipes.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the round headlamp, dual mirrors, and orange turn signals.
